title: Settings
subtitle: Runtime configuration. Changes apply immediately (retention is re-scheduled; the traceroute concurrency limit is reset).

retention_days.label: Result retention
retention_days.desc: Days to keep check results and traceroute runs. 0 = keep forever.

traceroute_timeout.label: Traceroute timeout
traceroute_timeout.desc: Overall timeout for a single traceroute run, in seconds.

traceroute_max_concurrency.label: Traceroute concurrency
traceroute_max_concurrency.desc: Maximum number of traceroute runs executing at the same time.
